overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character walking through a detailed urban environment. The character travels from a modern commercial sidewalk with glass buildings, past a police car with flashing lights, across a street intersection, and finally into a narrow abandoned railway alley with overgrown vegetation.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past pedestrians and glass office buildings

entered.detail: modern building with reflective glass facade running along the sidewalk
line of green trees along the curb
black public trash bin on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a commercial city sidewalk next to a modern glass office building. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and street trees line the curb. The environment is bright and sunny with wet pavement reflecting the light.

events.description: police car with flashing blue and red lights parked on the street

agents.ego_description: walking past a police car with emergency lights flashing on the left side of the street

notable_agents.action: police car parked with blue and red emergency lights flashing

entered.detail: red brick apartment buildings with fire escapes

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the sidewalk onto the street, passing a police car with flashing emergency lights. The architecture shifts from modern glass to older red brick buildings. Fewer pedestrians are present in this section.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with brick buildings and colorful storefronts

events.description: crossing the street at a marked crosswalk with other pedestrians
entering block with red brick buildings and colorful painted garage doors

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk and continuing along the sidewalk past groups of pedestrians

entered.detail: industrial garage doors painted in bright colors including blue, purple, and red
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a busy intersection at a crosswalk alongside other pedestrians. After crossing, the scene features red brick buildings with distinctive colorful garage doors. The street has moderate vehicle traffic and more trees providing shade.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned railway alley with overgrown vegetation

events.description: entering narrow alley with abandoned railway tracks and overgrown weeds

agents.ego_description: walking along abandoned railway tracks in a narrow alley between tall brick buildings

notable_agents.action: man in beige jacket standing near the tracks gesturing with his hands

entered.detail: abandoned train tracks running down the center of the alley with wooden ties
tall weeds and grass growing between the tracks and along the walls
tall red brick walls of adjacent buildings enclosing the narrow space

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, enclosed railway alley with abandoned tracks running down the center. The space is flanked by tall brick walls with overgrown vegetation and weeds. A man in a beige jacket stands near the tracks gesturing as the character passes by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bright urban center that gradually transitions into a secluded, overgrown industrial alley. It begins on a sunny commercial sidewalk beside a modern glass office building, where wet pavement reflects the light amidst a flow of pedestrians. As the character moves onto the street, the architecture shifts from sleek glass to older red brick, passing a police car with flashing emergency lights. The scene then expands across a busy intersection and past colorful garage doors before turning away from the traffic and shade of the main road. Finally, the camera enters a narrow, enclosed railway alley where abandoned tracks are flanked by tall brick walls and wild vegetation, passing a gesturing man in a beige jacket.
